roast.copy: string — the main roast line e.g. 'You replayed the same 3 songs 22 times. They're not going to text back.'
roast.intensity: enum: mild | medium | spicy — never crosses into mean

trigger.signal_type: string — what behaviour triggered this roast e.g. 'repeat_rate' | 'late_night_ratio' | 'genre_lock'
trigger.signal_value: string — the actual value that was roast-worthy e.g. '22 replays'

share.share_copy: string — slightly different from roast copy, optimised for sharing
